name: Aspen Snowmass
season_start_quote: Aspen Mountain and Snowmass to Open on Thursday, November 27
season_end_quote: The official closing date for the mountain is Sunday, April 5
annual_snowfall_quote: Snowmass receives an annual snowfall of 300 inches / 762 cm
airport_quote: The closest airport to Aspen Snowmass is Aspen/Pitkin County Airport, which is just three miles from the town of Aspen and six miles from Snowmass Village
notes: 4-mountain complex (Aspen Mountain, Snowmass, Aspen Highlands, Buttermilk). Aspen Highlands/Buttermilk open Dec 13, 2025.

name: Attitash Mountain Resort
season_start_quote: Attitash's opening day for 2025-2026 is 12/6/2025 and closing day is 4/13/2026
season_end_quote: Attitash's opening day for 2025-2026 is 12/6/2025 and closing day is 4/13/2026, with 129 days open
annual_snowfall_quote: Attitash receives an average of 120 inches of annual snowfall
airport_quote: The nearest airport is at Portland
notes: Vail Resorts property. New Adventure Center Lodge deck and snowmaking upgrades for 2025-26.

name: Badger Mountain Ski Area
season_start_quote: The volunteer-run hill was unable to operate for even a single day during the 2025-26 season due to a severe lack of snowfall
season_end_quote: The volunteer-run hill was unable to operate for even a single day during the 2025-26 season due to a severe lack of snowfall
airport_quote: Distance from Yakima Air Terminal to Waterville is 77.9 miles / 125.3 kilometers
notes: Volunteer-run, 1 T-bar + 2 rope tows + sledding. Did not open 2025-26 due to lack of snow. Typically January-only operation.

name: Badger Pass Ski Area (Yosemite)
season_start_quote: The ski area's opening date was pushed back to January 2, 2026
season_end_quote: Badger Pass officially closed for the season on Wednesday, March 18, 2026
airport_quote: Fresno Yosemite International Airport
notes: California's oldest ski area, inside Yosemite National Park. Originally planned Dec 13, pushed to Jan 2, 2026.

name: Bear Basin Nordic Center
airport_quote: Boise Airport (BOI / KBOI), located in Boise, Idaho and 112 miles from the center of McCall, ID
notes: Nordic/cross-country only. 25 km of classic and skate trails, dog-friendly. Non-profit run by Payette Lakes Ski Club.

name: Bear Creek Mountain Resort
season_start_quote: For the 2025-2026 ski season, Bear Creek Mountain Resort has an estimated start date of December 5, 2025
annual_snowfall_quote: Bear Creek Mountain Resort receives an average annual snowfall of 40 inches on its 510 feet of vertical, and it has 100% snowmaking capabilities
airport_quote: Lehigh Valley International Airport (ABE) is near the resort, making it the nearest major airport for visitors to the area
notes: Hotel, spa, ski, tubing & event resort in Macungie, PA. 330 wooded acres. 100% snowmaking. Within an hour of Philadelphia.

name: Bear Mountain
season_end_quote: Bear Mountain will likely remain open through Sunday, April 19, 2026, weather permitting
annual_snowfall_quote: Bear Mountain gets an average annual snowfall of 100" of snow per year
airport_quote: Ontario is the closest real airport to Big Bear Mountain
notes: Part of Big Bear Mountain Resort (Alterra). Known for park/pipe terrain. Ikon Pass.

name: Bear Paw Ski Bowl
season_start_quote: The area is open Saturdays and Sundays from 10:30 am to 4 pm after the new year (and snow permitting). There's no snowmaking at Bear Paw, so the ski area only opens when they have enough snow — usually mid-January — and stays open through March
annual_snowfall_quote: It's always the last Montana ski resort to open and has the lowest annual snowfall of any hill in the state, thanks to its location within the rain shadow of the much taller Rocky Mountains. The area receives an average of 140 inches of snowfall
airport_quote: Great Falls International Airport is a 2-hour drive (118 miles) and is the closest major airport to Havre, Montana
notes: Volunteer-run nonprofit on Rocky Boy Reservation, 29 mi south of Havre. Weekends only, mid-Jan through March.

name: Bear Valley Adventure Company
annual_snowfall_quote: Bear Valley gets an average annual snowfall of 278 inches of snow per year and on average has 35 snowfall days
airport_quote: Reno Airport (RNO) is located 73 miles from Bear Valley Ski Area
notes: Nordic/XC ski operation. 60+ km groomed trails over 3,000 acres. Sierra Nevada base at 7,000 ft.

name: Bear Valley Mountain Resort
season_start_quote: Bear Valley has a projected opening date of November 28, 2025
annual_snowfall_quote: Bear Valley receives an annual snowfall averaging over 359 inches
airport_quote: Reno Airport (RNO) is located 73 miles from Bear Valley Ski Area
notes: Sierra Nevada resort between Lake Tahoe and Yosemite, Highway 4. 9 lifts, 75+ runs, 1,680 skiable acres.

name: Beartooth Basin Summer Ski Area
season_start_quote: the ski area scheduled to open May 25 (weather permitting)
season_end_quote: in recent years, it has been tough for the mountain to remain open past mid-June
airport_quote: The closest airports are the Billings Logan International Airport or Yellowstone Regional Airport in Cody, Wyoming
notes: Summer-only ski area, only one in North America. Operates Memorial Day through early July. WY/MT border.

name: Beaver Creek Resort
season_start_quote: The season opening date is November 30, 2025
season_end_quote: Beaver Creek to close Sunday, two weeks earlier than initial target
annual_snowfall_quote: Beaver Creek gets an average annual snowfall of 323 inches
airport_quote: The closest regional airport is Eagle County Airport (EGE), a 30-minute drive east of the resort
notes: Vail Resorts property. Closed Mar 29, two weeks early due to low snowpack 2025-26.

name: Beaver Mountain
season_start_quote: Beaver Mountain's anticipated winter opening date for the 2025-2026 season is December 31, 2025
season_end_quote: the closing day for the 2025-26 season is Sunday, March 29, 2026
annual_snowfall_quote: Beaver Mountain receives approximately 400 inches of fluffy, dry powder every season
airport_quote: from Salt Lake International Airport it is 2 hours and 115 miles away
notes: Family-owned, no snowmaking, opens late due to natural snow dependence. New Marge's Cabin day lodge debuts 2025-26.

name: Beech Mountain Resort
season_start_quote: Beech Mountain Ski Resort is set to open December 5 for the 2025-26 ski season
annual_snowfall_quote: average natural snowfall reaches approximately 80-90 inches annually
airport_quote: Tri-Cities Airport in Tennessee (TRI, 60 miles)
notes: Highest ski area in eastern US. Ice skating rink, terrain park 'The Park', mountaintop village with dining.

name: Belleayre Mountain
season_start_quote: The 2025-2026 season opening day is December 6, 2025, with a closing day of April 12, 2026
season_end_quote: The 2025-2026 season opening day is December 6, 2025, with a closing day of April 12, 2026
annual_snowfall_quote: From October 1, 2025 to March 4, 2026, the season recorded 74 inches of snowfall
airport_quote: From Albany International Airport, the resort is about a two-hour drive
notes: NY State Olympic Regional Development Authority resort. 96% snowmaking coverage. Catskills.

name: Berkshire East Mountain Resort
annual_snowfall_quote: Berkshire East gets an average annual snowfall of 62 inches of snow per year and on average has 18 snowfall days
notes: Western MA. 45 trails. Snowmaking on all main trails. Year-round resort with zip lines/mountain coaster summer.

name: Bethel Village Trails
airport_quote: Portland International Jetport (PWM / KPWM) in Portland, Maine is 74 miles from the area
notes: Nordic/XC only. 35+ km groomed trails. Inland Woods + Trails operates Winter Trail Center at Bethel Inn Resort.

name: Big Bear Mountain Resort
season_end_quote: Bear Mountain will likely remain open through Sunday, April 19, 2026, weather permitting
annual_snowfall_quote: Bear Mountain gets an average annual snowfall of 100" of snow per year
airport_quote: Ontario is the closest real airport to Big Bear Mountain
notes: Parent of Bear Mountain, Snow Summit, Snow Valley. Owned by Alterra Mountain Company. Ikon Pass partner.

name: Ski Big Bear
annual_snowfall_quote: On average, Ski Big Bear gets about 50 inches of natural snow per year
airport_quote: The nearest airport to Big Bear at Masthope Mountain is Scranton, 71 minutes drive away
notes: Small Pocono resort at Masthope Mountain. 18 trails, 7 lifts, 650' vertical, 100% snowmaking.

name: Big Boulder
season_start_quote: The estimated start date for the 2025-2026 ski season is December 13, 2025, with a tentative end date of March 15, 2026
season_end_quote: The estimated start date for the 2025-2026 ski season is December 13, 2025, with a tentative end date of March 15, 2026
airport_quote: The ski resort is located less than an hour from Scranton and the Wilkes-Barre/Scranton International Airport
notes: Sister resort to Jack Frost (Vail Resorts). Snow tubing, night skiing, new bubly Tube Park. Pocono Mountains.

name: Big Powderhorn Mountain
annual_snowfall_quote: The resort receives 17 feet of average natural snowfall
airport_quote: Denver Air Connection provides airline service to the Gogebic-Iron County Airport (IWD), a 5 minute drive from Big Powderhorn Mountain
notes: Upper Peninsula MI in Gogebic Range. Lake Superior lake-effect snow. IWD only 5 min drive.

name: Big Rock
season_start_quote: The 2025-26 season kicks off December 12
season_end_quote: The mountain typically operates through late March or early April depending on snow conditions
closest_airport_name: Northern Maine Regional Airport at Presque Isle
airport_quote: the Northern Maine Regional Airport (PQI) in nearby Presque Isle, which is approximately 16 miles from the resort
notes: 501(c)(3) nonprofit. Mars Hill, ME (Aroostook County). 980' vertical, 32 trails, 80% snowmaking, Indy Pass.

name: Big Sky Resort
season_start_quote: Big Sky's opening day is slated for November 26 for the 2025-2026 season
annual_snowfall_quote: Big Sky averages around 400 inches of snowfall annually
airport_quote: the distance between Bozeman Airport (BZN) and Big Sky Resort, MT is 54 miles, with a road distance of 54.4 miles
notes: Largest skiing in U.S. by acreage. Lone Peak Tram, Ikon Pass partner. AI-predicted 300-325 inches mid-mountain 2025-26.

name: Big Snow American Dream
season_start_quote: Big Snow American Dream is an indoor skiing and snowboarding park within the American Dream shopping and entertainment complex
airport_quote: Newark Liberty International Airport (EWR) is the nearest major airport with international and domestic flights, located 16 miles from East Rutherford, NJ
notes: First and only year-round indoor ski park in North America. Inside American Dream mall. Year-round operation, no traditional season.

name: Big Moose Mountain
airport_quote: Bangor International Airport (BGR / KBGR), which has domestic flights from Bangor, Maine and is 67 miles from the center of Greenville, ME
notes: Nonprofit, lower mountain only operates. Triple chair to lower mountain, beginner conveyor. 9K Nordic trails. Maine's Piscataquis County, Moosehead Lake.

name: Bittersweet Ski Resort
season_start_quote: The warm weather and rain put an end to the 2025-2026 ski season for Bittersweet
season_end_quote: The warm weather and rain put an end to the 2025-2026 ski season for Bittersweet
annual_snowfall_quote: Lake-effect snow patterns can dump several inches of fresh powder on the Bittersweet Ski Area, with average annual snowfall ranging near 90 inches
airport_quote: Kalamazoo/Battle Creek International Airport is 19 miles away, and Grand Rapids Gerald R. Ford International Airport is 31 miles away
notes: Family-owned since 1982 in Otsego MI. 350' vertical, 20 runs, 6 chairlifts. Lake-effect snow.

name: Black Mountain Ski Area
season_start_quote: Black Mountain is scheduled to open November 15, 2025 and close May 25, 2026
season_end_quote: Black Mountain is scheduled to open November 15, 2025 and close May 25, 2026
annual_snowfall_quote: Black Mountain receives approximately 87 inches of annual snowfall
airport_quote: Portland International Jetport (PWM) in Portland, Maine, 67 miles from Jackson, NH
notes: Jackson, NH. Cooperative-owned, free skiing for town residents on opening day. 68 trails, 1,100' vertical.

name: Black Mountain (NH)
season_start_quote: Black Mountain is scheduled to open November 15, 2025 and close May 25, 2026
season_end_quote: Black Mountain is scheduled to open November 15, 2025 and close May 25, 2026
annual_snowfall_quote: Black Mountain receives approximately 87 inches of annual snowfall
airport_quote: Portland International Jetport (PWM) in Portland, Maine, 67 miles from Jackson, NH
notes: Same Jackson, NH resort as 'black-area' slug — appears to be a duplicate slug entry pointing to Black Mountain Ski Area.

name: Black Mountain of Maine
season_start_quote: Black Mountain of Maine was prepping the trails in mid-December 2025 to welcome visitors on December 26 for skiing, riding and tubing
season_end_quote: The estimated start date is December 26, 2025 and the tentative end date is March 29, 2026
airport_quote: Augusta State Airport (AUG), which is 40.6 miles away
notes: Family-friendly community ski area, Rumford ME. Run by nonprofit Chisholm Ski Club. Alpine, Nordic and tubing.

name: Blackjack Mountain
annual_snowfall_quote: Blackjack is in an area called "Big Snow Country", so named because of the annual 200-inch (5.1 m) average snowfall, courtesy of the lake effect from Lake Superior
airport_quote: Denver Air Connection provides airline service to the Gogebic-Iron County Airport (IWD)
notes: Renamed 'Black River Basin' as part of Snowriver Mountain Resort (with Indianhead). UP Michigan, Bessemer. 22 runs, 126 acres.
